CREATE TABLE employees (id Int32, name String, department_id Int32);
CREATE TABLE departments (id Int32, name String);
SELECT formatQuery('SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department_id = 1;');
SELECT formatQuery('SELECT e.name, d.name FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE d.name = ''HR'';');
SELECT formatQuery('SELECT e.name FROM employees e WHERE e.id IN (SELECT id FROM employees WHERE department_id = 1);');
SELECT formatQuery('SELECT e.name FROM employees e WHERE e.id = (SELECT min(id) FROM employees);');
SELECT formatQuery('WITH dept AS (SELECT id FROM departments WHERE name = ''IT'') SELECT e.name FROM employees e JOIN dept ON e.department_id = dept.id;');
SELECT formatQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT department_id FROM employees) AS subquery;');
SELECT formatQuery('SELECT e.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE department_id = e.department_id) AS department_count FROM employees e;');
SELECT formatQuery('SELECT * FROM employees WHERE (id, department_id) IN (SELECT id, department_id FROM employees WHERE name LIKE ''%e%'') ORDER BY id;');
SELECT formatQuery('SELECT * FROM (SELECT name, COUNT(id) AS count FROM employees GROUP BY name) AS grouped WHERE count > 1;');
